summary: Iteration 28 (⌘K global search, sell-through-by-location, daily footfall calendar) — fully tested. Backend: 9/9 pytest pass. Frontend: global palette, Inventory sell-through card, Footfall daily calendar, and all 8 route smoke-tests pass. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warnings ('width(-1) and height(-1) of chart') appear on initial render of some charts — cosmetic but logged continually on Overview; consider setting minWidth/minHeight on ResponsiveContainer (pre-existing, not introduced by iter-28).
search.py handles upstream /customer-search exceptions by swallowing silently (customer_matches = []). A log line would help observability.

sell-through-by-location early-continues when (stock<=0 AND units<=0) — correct for pure-online no-sale locations, but slightly coupled with the 'no_stock_data' branch below; a short inline comment would make the dead-row skip more obvious.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded upstream data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 is green. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_28_search_sellthrough_calendar.py (pytest, 9 tests, ~48s). Daily-calendar endpoint is slow on cold-cache (10-30s for first call), subsequent calls cached for 1h. Global palette uses document keydown for Meta+K / Control+K and data-testid='open-global-search' button. Frontend Playwright gotcha: on the no-match path, the upstream customer-search can take 3-5s, so wait up to 6s before asserting 'No matches'. Calendar weekday headers render uppercase ('MON','TUE',…) not 'Mon','Tue'.

backend: GET /api/search → 401/403 without auth, 422 on empty q, 200 grouped payload with all groups + links, pages lookup by label returns /inventory.

GET /api/analytics/sell-through-by-location → 400 without dates; 200 returns rows with all required keys, health ∈ allowed set, real rows sorted by sell_through_pct desc, no_stock_data rows have pct=null and stock=0.
GET /api/footfall/daily-calendar → 400 on invalid date, 200 returns window+days+max_footfall; window.days==24 for 2026-04-01..2026-04-24; weekday ∈ 0..6; 180-day request clamps to 90.
frontend: ⌘K button (data-testid='open-global-search') and Meta+K shortcut both open palette.
Empty query shows 'Jump to anything'. Typing 'inventory' shows 'Pages · 2' with Inventory link. Typing gibberish shows 'No matches for <q>'.
Escape and click-outside close the palette; Meta+K reopens.
Inventory page: sell-through-by-location card + sell-through-table render 31 rows, sorted desc, KES-formatted, no '$' anywhere.

Footfall page: ff-daily-calendar card renders 31 calendar-cell-<date> elements, summary line ('Total footfall: 71,825 · Orders: 8,819 · Sales: KES 82,180,106 · Avg conversion: 12.3%'), Busiest/Quietest chips, and the honesty footnote about upstream daily-only data.
Route smoke-test: /overview /locations /customers /products /inventory /re-order /ibt /pricing all return 200 with no error banner.
